## What changed

Describe the user-facing problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant frontend checks (`npm run verify` where practical).
- [ ] I ran relevant Rust checks for backend changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I updated public documentation when behavior or setup changed.

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private endpoints, personal paths, or private file contents are included.
- [ ] Persisted state, logs, diagnostics, and support output redact sensitive values.
- [ ] New network requests are documented, scoped, and user-initiated.
- [ ] Risky actions retain an explicit permission or approval boundary.

## Screenshots

Add redacted before/after screenshots for visible UI changes.
